desc.en:
Wake up to breathtaking Mediterranean sunrises from this beautifully positioned 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the highly desirable area of La Veleta, Torrevieja. Offering the potential to create a second bedroom, this versatile property is perfect as a holiday home, permanent residence, or investment opportunity.
The standout feature is the generous balcony, where spectacular sea views provide the perfect backdrop for morning coffee, al fresco dining, or simply unwinding while listening to the waves. With the beach just steps from your front door, you'll enjoy the very best of coastal living every day.
The apartment is being sold fully furnished, allowing you to move straight in or begin renting it out immediately. Its flexible layout also offers excellent scope to convert it into a two-bedroom home, adding both practicality and future value.
Situated in one of Torrevieja's most sought-after coastal locations, you'll find supermarkets, shops, cafés, bars, and restaurants all within easy walking distance, ensuring every convenience is close at hand while you enjoy the relaxed Mediterranean lifestyle.
Properties in this location, with such exceptional sea views and development potential, are rarely available. This is a wonderful opportunity to own a home in one of the Costa Blanca's most desirable seaside settings.

Enjoy the very best of coastal living in this beautifully situated 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the heart of Cabo Roig. Perfectly positioned just a few steps from the beach, you’ll also have an excellent selection of lively bars, restaurants, cafés, and shops right on your doorstep, meaning everything you need is within easy walking distance.
The apartment offers a private balcony with sea views, the ideal spot to relax with a morning coffee or unwind in the evening as the sun sets over the Mediterranean. Guests also have access to a communal rooftop terrace with breathtaking panoramic views, providing a perfect setting for sunbathing or enjoying warm summer nights.
Every Thursday, the famous Cabo Roig street market comes alive just outside your door, offering fresh local produce, fashion, gifts, and a vibrant atmosphere that captures the spirit of the area.
Inside, the apartment features two spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a comfortable living and dining area designed for easy holiday living. Private parking is also included, adding extra convenience for those who choose to explore further along the Costa Blanca.
This is the ideal base for beach lovers, food enthusiasts, golfers, and anyone looking to experience the relaxed Mediterranean lifestyle in one of Orihuela Costa’s most sought-after locations.

Discover an exceptional opportunity to build your dream home or investment property on this well-positioned urban plot, ideally located just five minutes from the beach. Combining the convenience of urban living with the tranquility of a coastal setting, this plot offers the perfect foundation for a bespoke residence, holiday retreat, or development project.
Enjoy easy access to local amenities, restaurants, shops, and leisure facilities, all while benefiting from a peaceful neighborhood. This plot presents excellent, efficient building opportunities to maximize your footprint.

This bright and spacious three-bedroom, two-bathroom penthouse property has been thoughtfully designed to maximise natural light and outdoor living. The heart of the home features a generous open-plan living and dining area, complete with a newly upgraded motorised shutter system for effortless comfort. The modern, fully equipped kitchen comes complete with a high-end under-sink water osmosis system. The property is sold fully furnished to an exceptional standard, meaning you can unpack your bags and start living the dream immediately.
Outdoor living is where this property truly shines. The main living space opens onto a charming balcony enhanced with premium artificial grass and horizontal and lateral awnings, creating an intimate setting for your morning coffee. Upstairs, the spectacular private rooftop solarium is a true oasis, meticulously upgraded to include a bespoke outdoor worktop with an integrated sink, washing machine, and tumble dryer. Complete with an awning, an electric barbecue, an outdoor shower, and a beautifully landscaped garden area with an automatic irrigation system, it is the ultimate venue for sunbathing all day or hosting evening dinner parties under the stars.
The entire residence has been recently repainted and comes with premium extra perks, including a dedicated underground parking spot with valuable extra space on the side. Situated within an impeccably maintained gated community, residents gain exclusive access to resort-style communal facilities, including swimming pool, a relaxing jacuzzi and sauna, an outdoor gym arena, a children’s playground, and two petanque courts.

Discover this beautifully renovated ground floor apartment offering comfort, style, and an unbeatable location in the sought-after surroundings of La Fuente Commercial Centre. Designed for easy living, the property features 2 spacious bedrooms and 2 modern bathrooms, making it ideal as a permanent home, holiday retreat, or investment opportunity.
The bright and welcoming interior opens onto a sun-drenched south-facing terrace, perfect for enjoying outdoor dining, relaxing in the Spanish sunshine, or entertaining friends and family throughout the year.
Located just a short stroll from the restaurants, cafés, shops, and amenities of La Fuente Commercial Centre, this apartment combines convenience with a relaxed Mediterranean lifestyle. The popular La Zenia Boulevard shopping centre and the beautiful Orihuela Costa beaches are only a short drive away, offering endless options for shopping, leisure, and coastal days out.
Residents can enjoy access to a well-maintained communal swimming pool, while the property also benefits from private parking, adding extra comfort and practicality.
A fantastic opportunity to own a renovated home in a prime location, close to everything you need while enjoying the peace and sunshine of the Costa Blanca.

Discover Oasis Laguna 3, an exciting new build development offering modern 2 and 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom tourist apartments in the highly desirable area of El Raso, Guardamar del Segura. Combining contemporary design, resort-style facilities, and a prime Costa Blanca location, these properties represent a fantastic opportunity for both lifestyle buyers and investors.
Each apartment has been designed for comfort and functionality, featuring bright open-plan living spaces and a private terrace — perfect for enjoying the Mediterranean climate, relaxing, or entertaining.
The development benefits from beautifully maintained communal gardens and a stunning swimming pool area, creating a holiday-style atmosphere for residents and guests to enjoy. Each apartment also includes a private parking space, adding convenience and further appeal.
Located close to the golden beaches of Guardamar, local amenities, restaurants, leisure facilities, and the famous natural surroundings of the Laguna, Oasis Laguna 3 offers an ideal setting for holidays or rental potential.
With its touristic licence, modern construction, attractive facilities, and strong demand for holiday accommodation in the area, these apartments provide an excellent investment opportunity on the Costa Blanca.
Whether you are looking for a profitable rental investment or a lock-up-and-leave holiday home, Oasis Laguna 3 offers the perfect combination of quality, location, and opportunity.

Discover a unique restaurant opportunity in one of the most sought-after coastal locations on the Costa Blanca, perfectly positioned beside the stunning Cala Capitán Beach. This exceptional beachside venue combines a prime location, beautiful surroundings, and a fully equipped setup designed for a successful hospitality business.
Boasting a gorgeous terrace with breathtaking coastal views, the restaurant offers the perfect setting for relaxed lunches, sunset dining, cocktails, and memorable evenings by the sea. The inviting restaurant area provides a stylish and comfortable atmosphere for guests, complemented by a dedicated bar area ideal for creating a vibrant social hub throughout the day and night.
Behind the scenes, the property features a large, highly functional professional kitchen, fitted with top-quality commercial kitchen machinery and equipment to ensure efficient operations and a smooth-running service. Designed with the needs of a busy restaurant in mind, the layout allows chefs and staff to work effectively while maintaining high standards of food preparation and delivery.
Additional features include a spacious basement storage area, providing valuable extra space for stock management, supplies, and operations, together with a large walk-in freezer to support a high-volume restaurant environment.
With its unbeatable beachfront position, attractive layout, premium facilities, and strong potential for a thriving hospitality concept, this restaurant represents an outstanding opportunity to establish or expand a successful dining destination in the heart of Cabo Roig. A rare chance to take on a fully prepared venue in one of the area’s most desirable coastal locations.

A fantastic opportunity to own a charming 2 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment in the highly desirable Molino Blanco urbanisation, La Zenia. Ideally located for enjoying the very best of the Costa Blanca lifestyle, this property combines peaceful surroundings with unbeatable convenience.
The apartment enjoys lovely views overlooking the park, creating a relaxing and open outlook while still being close to all local amenities. The bright and comfortable living space, well-proportioned bedrooms, and practical layout make this an ideal home, holiday retreat, or investment opportunity.
Perfectly positioned, you have everything you need right on your doorstep — with an excellent choice of shops, supermarkets, cafés, bars, and restaurants all within easy walking distance. The famous Zenia Boulevard is only a few minutes away, offering a huge selection of fashion stores, restaurants, entertainment, and leisure facilities.
The stunning beaches of La Zenia are also just a short distance away, allowing you to enjoy sunny days by the sea, coastal walks, and the relaxed Mediterranean lifestyle.
Set within the popular Molino Blanco urbanisation, this apartment offers the perfect balance of peaceful park views and a vibrant location — a wonderful place to enjoy holidays, year-round living, or a smart property investment on the Costa Blanca.

Perched atop the prestigious Bravo Hills Club in Ciudad Quesada, this charming two-bedroom townhouse offers breathtaking, panoramic views stretching over the famous pink salt lakes all the way to the Mediterranean Sea. This bright home features a desirable dual orientation that floods the living spaces with natural light and a refreshing breeze. The ground floor boasts a spacious lounge, a fully equipped kitchen, a guest toilet, and seamless access to a private terrace and a fenced garden, ideal for enjoying a quiet morning coffee or dining under the stars. Upstairs, you'll find a family bathroom with bath and two comfortable bedrooms, including a master bedroom with mesmerizing sea views, while the spectacular rooftop solarium features a versatile glazed room perfect for a home office or extra guest space.
Sold fully furnished, the property is entirely move-in ready. It is nestled within a secure, gated community complete with freshly painted facades, manicured gardens, a sparkling communal pool, and private parking. Perfectly positioned for ultimate convenience, you are just a five-minute walk from local bars, ten-minute stroll from local international restaurants and shops, a short fifteen-minute drive from the golden beaches of Guardamar del Segura, and only forty minutes from Alicante Airport. Properties with views of this calibre in Bravo Hills Club rarely stay on the market long.

Discover this exceptional newly built home, completed in 2025, offering the perfect combination of modern design, comfort, and outdoor living in one of Villamartin’s most desirable locations.
This beautifully presented 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom semi-detatched villa has been designed with a focus on space, natural light, and effortless Mediterranean living. The property comes fully furnished and is ready to move into, making it the ideal choice for a permanent home, holiday retreat, or investment opportunity.
The villa boasts a fantastic selection of outdoor spaces, including a private swimming pool, private parking, front and rear garden areas, and three separate terraces — giving you the perfect setting to enjoy the Spanish sunshine throughout the day. The impressive private solarium provides the ultimate place to relax, entertain guests, or enjoy stunning open views.
Inside, the home features a bright and modern open-plan kitchen and living area, creating a stylish and welcoming space for everyday living. Additional features include air conditioning, a solar energy system, and electric shutters, offering comfort, efficiency, and modern convenience.
Located in the sought-after area of Villamartin, close to a wide range of amenities, restaurants, golf courses, and just a short drive from the beautiful Costa Blanca coastline, this villa offers everything needed to enjoy the Mediterranean lifestyle.
A fantastic opportunity to own a brand-new villa combining quality, style, privacy, and an unbeatable location.

Having just finished a complete, high-end renovation, every detail inside this exceptional 5 bedroom, 2 bathroom semi-detached property has been meticulously curated using only the finest, high-durability materials. The ground floor layout offers beautifully styled, light-filled living areas and is perfectly optimised for the sun-drenched Spanish lifestyle, featuring brand-new pocket sliding doors that open completely to merge the bright, breezy interior with the private patio.
The main house features four beautifully styled, light-filled bedrooms and a family bathroom, providing ample space and comfort for family and guests. Offering incredible versatility, a separate independent outbuilding comes complete with its own ensuite bedroom and bathroom—an ideal setup for a private guest suite, a quiet home office, or a dedicated wellness sanctuary. Modern energy efficiency is also seamlessly integrated into the design via a solar water heater.
The outdoor space is a bespoke entertainment haven engineered for resort-style living. It features a heated private pool with integrated lighting, a fountain, a therapeutic Jacuzzi, and a spectacular, one-of-a-kind pool cave. A spacious outdoor seating area complements the stunning, custom-built outdoor kitchen, which comes fully equipped with a premium barbecue setup perfect for hosting year-round alfresco dinner parties.
Situated in a remarkably quiet and peaceful location, this home provides a serene escape while remaining well-connected to the best of the region. Beach, local amenities, bars, and restaurants are just a short distance away.

Discover this beautifully presented, spacious apartment located in the highly sought-after area of Los Dolses, perfectly positioned within walking distance to a fantastic selection of amenities, restaurants, shops, and the popular Saturday market. Offering the perfect blend of modern living, comfort, and convenience, this home is ideal as a permanent residence, holiday retreat, or investment opportunity.
Built in 2024 by renowned developers Amay, this contemporary apartment offers the quality, style, and energy efficiency expected from a brand-new property. The spacious layout features 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, designed with both comfort and practicality in mind.
The highlight of the property is the impressive large private terrace overlooking the beautifully maintained communal gardens and swimming pool. This outdoor space has been enhanced with elegant glass curtains, allowing you to enjoy the terrace all year round — creating the perfect area for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying the Spanish sunshine in every season.
Two of the bedrooms benefit from beautiful sea views, adding a touch of tranquillity and luxury to your everyday living. The property also includes a private underground parking space and a separate storage room, providing valuable additional convenience and space.
Located close to everything you need, including local amenities, the Saturday market, and just a short distance from the coast, this apartment offers the ideal lifestyle in one of the Costa Blanca’s most desirable areas.
A fantastic opportunity to own a modern home in Los Dolses — combining location, quality, and lifestyle in one exceptional property.

This stunning fully renovated 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom ground floor apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and location in one of the Costa Blanca’s most sought-after areas.
Boasting a desirable south-facing orientation, the property enjoys sunshine throughout the day. The spacious front terrace is the ideal spot for relaxing, dining al fresco, or simply soaking up the Mediterranean climate. To the rear, a second terrace provides additional outdoor space and includes a convenient storage room.
Situated just a stone’s throw from the popular Los Dolses Commercial Centre, residents have an excellent selection of bars, restaurants, cafés, shops, and supermarkets right on their doorstep. The renowned La Zenia Boulevard shopping centre is also within easy walking distance, offering an extensive range of retail, dining, and entertainment options.
The apartment forms part of a beautifully maintained urbanisation with attractive landscaped gardens and enjoys lovely views overlooking the prestigious Villamartín Golf Course, creating a peaceful and picturesque setting.
Whether you're looking for a permanent residence, holiday home, or investment property, this exceptional apartment offers an unbeatable combination of modern living, outdoor space, and prime location.

This unique single-level country estate stands out for its striking, rounded architecture, distinct character, and incredible potential. Stepping through the entryway to the left, the heart of the main home features a spacious lounge with incredible architectural details such as wooden beams, arched windows looking out to the interior yard, and a feature stone wall. To the right of the entryway is a fully equipped independent kitchen complete with traditional features and beautiful granite countertops. Custom stained-glass windows highlight the home's unique architectural lines. The layout wraps elegantly around a central internal courtyard featuring a fountain and direct stairs leading up to the rooftop solarium. The main villa cleanly distributes four large bedrooms and a private study across the floor plan, alongside two bathrooms, all connecting smoothly to expansive covered porches. There is also a large garage currently converted into extra living space.
Set on an expansive plot designed to enjoy the Mediterranean climate, the outdoor space features two large porches, a 53 m² private swimming pool, and gardens filled with mature palm, pine, and fruit trees. The exterior of the property does require some general maintenance and retouch work—it needs a bit of love, but the structural character and upside potential are massive. Excellent guest and wellness features are already built, including a completely detached guest wing with one independent bedroom and bathroom, two independent ground-floor flats with a living area, kitchen, and bedroom with en-suite, a registered wooden Finnish sauna, and a private covered Jacuzzi cabin.
Practicality meets versatility with a separate 85 m² social lounge located right next to the pool terrace, making it an ideal space for large family gatherings, a fitness/yoga studio, or a commercial event room. Furthermore, the adjacent plot comes with a second house to reform.
The location offers total privacy right next to the peaceful nature reserve, while keeping everyday conveniences within easy reach. You are just a 15-minute drive from Elche’s historic city center and 15 minutes from the beach. Travel is straightforward, with quick access to Alicante airport.

**Spacious 3-Bedroom Townhouse with Sea Views in Prime La Zenia Location**
This attractive 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse is ideally situated within a secure gated community, just a 10-minute walk from both La Zenia Beach and La Zenia Boulevard shopping centre.
The property offers generous living space throughout, featuring three large and usable bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a modern kitchen, and front and rear garden areas perfect for outdoor living. The home has been slightly reformed, combining modern comforts with excellent potential for personalisation.
The ground floor comprises a bright and spacious living room, a full bathroom, and a modern kitchen located at the rear, with direct access to the back patio. Both the front and rear outdoor areas provide ideal spaces for dining, relaxing, or entertaining.
On the first floor, you will find two spacious bedrooms and a family bathroom. One of the bedrooms benefits from its own private balcony.
The top floor is dedicated to a large master bedroom with access to a private balcony offering beautiful sea views, creating the perfect retreat to enjoy the Mediterranean lifestyle.
Residents of the community have access to a communal swimming pool and secure gated parking.
This property is an excellent choice as a permanent residence, holiday home, or investment opportunity thanks to its sought-after location, spacious layout, and proximity to all amenities.

Discover El Oasis, an exceptional finca set within 18.268m² of private land in the beautiful countryside of Fuente Álamo, Murcia, just minutes from the renowned Circuito de Velocidad de Fuente Álamo. Combining spacious accommodation, outstanding leisure facilities, and excellent commercial potential, this is a truly rare opportunity in one of the region's most desirable rural locations.
The estate offers approximately 558 m2 of built space and is centred around a stunning 80m² swimming pool, creating a private oasis perfect for enjoying the Mediterranean lifestyle.
Designed for flexibility and comfort, the property features two independent residential units, each comprising:
3 spacious bedrooms 1 bathroom Fully equipped kitchen Comfortable living and dining area
With a total of 6 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, El Oasis is perfectly suited for large families, guest accommodation, holiday rentals, or a boutique hospitality business.
A standout feature of the property is its impressive events hall and restaurant, with capacity for up to 150 guests. Whether used for weddings, private celebrations, corporate events, retreats, or a hospitality venture, the venue offers outstanding potential for income generation and business development.
Property Highlights 18.268² private plot Spectacular 80m² swimming pool Two self-contained living accommodations 6 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms in total Events hall and restaurant for up to 150 guests Extensive outdoor space and parking Peaceful countryside setting Close to Fuente Álamo Racing Circuit Ideal for residential, tourism, leisure, or commercial use
El Oasis is far more than a finca—it is a unique lifestyle property offering privacy, space, and exceptional business opportunities. Whether you are looking for a prestigious country residence, a thriving events venue, or an investment with multiple income streams, this remarkable estate delivers it all.
A truly exceptional property where lifestyle and opportunity meet in the heart of Murcia.

Step inside this masterfully reimagined detached country house, fully insulated inside and out and upgraded to the highest specifications. The light-filled lounge serves as an incredible relaxation hub, featuring a striking natural stone media wall and a built-in fire for cosy winter evenings. For effortless year-round comfort and security, the home boasts a brand-new roof, ducted hot and cold air-conditioning, windows with built-in shutters, and traditional security rejas.
The ultra-luxury, high-end kitchen is styled in sophisticated matt dark grey with cream granite worktops, under-lighting, and premium integrated appliances—including a built-in coffee machine for your morning espresso. This stunning layout offers 3 spacious bedrooms with custom fitted wardrobes and a luxury bathroom tiled floor-to-ceiling with elegant his-and-hers sinks, a walk-in shower, and a standalone oval feature bath with floor standing taps.
Outside, a private paradise awaits on a massive 6,500m² plot enclosed by new natural stone walls and dotted with established olive trees. You can soak up the Spanish sunshine by the new 6m x 4m swimming pool with LED lighting and anti-slip tiling, or host alfresco dinners at the dedicated BBQ station. Exceptional extra perks include a grand driveway for 10+ cars, a garage/workshop with electricity and a working guest toilet (perfect for a "man cave" or home office), a 10,000-litre fresh water well, and connected irrigation. This turn-key eco-conscious home is sold fully furnished with premium, high-end equipment inside and out.

Step inside this stunning detached villa, refurbished just three years ago. The heart of the home features a bright and spacious open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area, perfectly complemented by a cosy, working fireplace for those cooler winter evenings. New, ceiling-height windows flood the interior with natural light while providing excellent insulation. The layout flows effortlessly into a spacious master bedroom complete with its own en-suite bathroom, and, separate on the other side of the living area, two beautifully appointed bedrooms and a bathroom, offering ultimate privacy. The interior is completed by a practical laundry room and a dedicated storeroom out the back.
Designed to make the most of the Spanish sunshine, the property is set on an expansive plot that features two charming porches, an extensive garden with fruit trees, and a spectacular private swimming pool. Ascend to the solarium to be greeted by stunning views of the iconic Torrevieja pink lake and the sea, the perfect backdrop for sunbathing all day, enjoying morning coffees, or hosting evening gatherings under the stars. Forward-thinking eco-features truly elevate this property, including solar panels, a solar water heater, and a massive 8,000-litre cisterna water storage tank.
Practicality meets convenience with an abundance of versatile storage space distributed thoughtfully around the property, ideal for effortlessly tucking away golf clubs, beach gear, and outdoor equipment. Further enhancing this functionality is a generous covered garage with ample space for two cars, offering secure parking and providing essential shade to keep your vehicles cool and protected from the Mediterranean sun all year round.
Location is everything, and this villa delivers convenience right to your doorstep. You are just a casual two-minute stroll away from local bars and restaurants. For beach lovers,the beach is a mere 10-minute drive away. Golf enthusiasts will appreciate the close proximity to La Marquesa Golf, whilst international travel is made effortless with easy access via both Alicante and Murcia airports.

Discover this beautifully fully renovated 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom first-floor apartment in the heart of Torrevieja — the perfect blend of comfort, style, and unbeatable location.
Bright and modern throughout, this move-in-ready home features a fresh contemporary design, spacious living areas, and a charming private balcony ideal for enjoying your morning coffee or evening drink in the Mediterranean sunshine.
Situated just steps away from bars, restaurants, supermarkets, shops, and all essential amenities, everything you need is right on your doorstep. Plus, the stunning beaches of Torrevieja are only a few minutes’ drive away, making this an ideal holiday home, permanent residence, or investment opportunity.
Enjoy vibrant coastal living in one of the Costa Blanca’s most sought-after locations.

Designed for a comfortable balance of indoor and outdoor living, this contemporary three-bedroom, two-bathroom detached villa features a bright, open-plan living space. The lounge comes fully furnished with a reclining sofa and designer chairs, creating a welcoming area to relax. Adjacent to the living room is a fully equipped kitchen, fitted with high-quality Siemens induction appliances and sleek cabinetry, making it highly functional for daily living and entertaining.
Both modern bathrooms benefit from natural light streaming through a feature skylight positioned directly over the shower. The main bedroom includes its own private en-suite bathroom, electric shutters, and an adjustable awning for tailored comfort. Built with sustainability in mind, the home is equipped with full air conditioning, infrared heating, and a 15-panel solar system with a 10 kW battery, keeping running costs low throughout the year. Security and convenience are well catered for with a private carport and an alarm system with four motion-detection cameras.
The outdoor space spans 240 m² on a 300 m² plot, offering plenty of room to enjoy the Spanish climate. The terrace features a 4 x 7-metre salt-electrolysis swimming pool, complete with a built-in Jacuzzi, fountain feature and a Zodiac heat pump for year-round use. At the rear, the private garden provides a mix of sun and shade throughout the day, thanks to adjustable awnings that make it an ideal setting for outdoor dining and relaxation.
The villa is situated 3 km from the local village centre and just a 10-minute drive from the coast's beautiful beaches. The popular Zenia Boulevard commercial centre is also only 10 minutes away, offering extensive shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Golf enthusiasts will appreciate the close proximity to several top courses, including the renowned Las Colinas Golf & Country Club.

Designed for a comfortable balance of indoor and outdoor living, this contemporary three-bedroom, two-bathroom detached villa features a bright, open-plan living space. The lounge comes fully furnished with a reclining sofa and designer chairs, creating a welcoming area to relax. Adjacent to the living room is a fully equipped kitchen, fitted with high-quality Siemens induction appliances and sleek cabinetry, making it highly functional for daily living and entertaining.
Both modern bathrooms benefit from natural light streaming through a feature skylight positioned directly over the shower. The main bedroom includes its own private en-suite bathroom, electric shutters, and an adjustable awning for tailored comfort. Built with sustainability in mind, the home is equipped with full air conditioning, infrared heating, and a 15-panel solar system with a 10 kW battery, keeping running costs low throughout the year. Security and convenience are well catered for with a private carport and an alarm system with four motion-detection cameras.
The outdoor space spans 240 m² on a 300 m² plot, offering plenty of room to enjoy the Spanish climate. The terrace features a 4 x 7-metre salt-electrolysis swimming pool, complete with a built-in Jacuzzi, fountain feature and a Zodiac heat pump for year-round use. At the rear, the private garden provides a mix of sun and shade throughout the day, thanks to adjustable awnings that make it an ideal setting for outdoor dining and relaxation.
The villa is situated 3 km from the local village centre and just a 10-minute drive from the coast's beautiful beaches. The popular Zenia Boulevard commercial centre is also only 10 minutes away, offering extensive shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Golf enthusiasts will appreciate the close proximity to several top courses, including the renowned Las Colinas Golf & Country Club.

Discover coastal living at its best with this charming top-floor 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the highly sought-after area of La Veleta, Torrevieja. Just moments from the sea, this bright and inviting home offers beautiful sea views from the private balcony — the perfect spot to enjoy your morning coffee or evening sunsets.
Ideally located within walking distance of popular bars, restaurants, and the Aldi supermarket, this apartment combines convenience with a relaxed Mediterranean lifestyle. The top-floor position provides added privacy, natural light, and refreshing sea breezes throughout the day.
Whether you’re looking for a holiday getaway, rental investment, or permanent residence by the coast, this apartment offers an unbeatable location close to beaches, amenities, and the vibrant heart of Torrevieja.
Enjoy sun, sea, and everything the Costa Blanca lifestyle has to offer right on your doorstep.

This inviting 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse is full of classic Spanish charm and warmth across a wonderfully functional multi-level layout. The ground floor opens up to a spacious living area seamlessly connected to a traditional open-plan wooden kitchen via a stylish breakfast bar and feature archway, making it a fantastic social hub for the home. For added convenience, a practical guest bathroom is also located downstairs. Directly off the kitchen, you are greeted by a private, fully tiled terrace, an idyllic backdrop for morning coffees in the Mediterranean sunshine or hosting breezy evening barbecues under the stars.
The upper levels are dedicated to rest and relaxation. The first floor hosts cozy, private sleeping quarters, where both bedrooms open out onto their own charming balconies, perfect for enjoying a quiet moment with a cool breeze. Ascending to the top level, you will find the impressive master bedroom, offering a generous layout and an abundance of natural light.
As part of an established community, residents also enjoy exclusive access to a beautiful communal pool and beautifully landscaped garden areas, providing a serene oasis for cooling off after a long day in the sun.

Perched atop the prestigious Bravo Hills Club in Ciudad Quesada, this charming two-bedroom townhouse offers breathtaking, panoramic views stretching over the famous pink salt lakes all the way to the Mediterranean Sea. This bright home features a desirable dual orientation that floods the living spaces with natural light and a refreshing breeze. The ground floor boasts a spacious lounge, a fully equipped kitchen, a guest toilet, and seamless access to a private terrace and a fenced garden, ideal for enjoying a quiet morning coffee or dining under the stars. Upstairs, you'll find a family bathroom with bath and two comfortable bedrooms, including a master bedroom with mesmerizing sea views, while the spectacular rooftop solarium features a versatile glazed room perfect for a home office or extra guest space.
Sold fully furnished, the property is entirely move-in ready. It is nestled within a secure, gated community complete with freshly painted facades, manicured gardens, a sparkling communal pool, and private parking. Perfectly positioned for ultimate convenience, you are just a five-minute walk from local bars, ten-minute stroll from local international restaurants and shops, a short fifteen-minute drive from the golden beaches of Guardamar del Segura, and only forty minutes from Alicante Airport. Properties with views of this calibre in Bravo Hills Club rarely stay on the market long.

Located in the sought-after Sal y Mar urbanisation in La Zenia, this stunning south-east facing penthouse apartment offers the perfect combination of style, comfort, and Mediterranean living. Featuring 2 spacious bedrooms and 1 bathroom, the property is ideal as a holiday home, permanent residence, or investment opportunity.
Flooded with natural light thanks to its desirable orientation, the apartment boasts a fantastic private solarium — the perfect place to relax, entertain, sunbathe, or enjoy outdoor dining all year round. Residents also benefit from access to a beautiful communal swimming pool and landscaped communal areas, creating a peaceful resort-style atmosphere.
The property further offers a large private driveway or garden area, adding both convenience and valuable outdoor space. Situated in the popular Sal y Mar urbanisation, you are just minutes from La Zenia Boulevard, a wide selection of restaurants, cafés, shops, and the stunning blue-flag beaches of La Zenia.
A fantastic opportunity to own a bright and stylish penthouse in one of the Costa Blanca’s most desirable coastal locations.

Welcome to this exceptional 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom corner apartment in the highly sought-after Lamar Resort VII in Pilar de la Horadada, completed in 2023 and presented in immaculate modern condition.
Positioned on a desirable corner plot, the apartment boasts a spectacular wraparound terrace, offering an abundance of outdoor space to relax, dine, and entertain while enjoying beautiful sea views and overlooking the stunning communal swimming pool. The unique layout allows natural light to flood the property throughout the day, creating a bright and airy atmosphere.
Designed with contemporary style and comfort in mind, the apartment features a spacious open-plan living area, high-quality finishes, and modern bathrooms, making it ideal for both permanent living and luxurious holiday escapes.
The property also benefits from a private parking space in the secure underground garage along with a large private storeroom, providing excellent practicality and additional storage.
Located in one of the most desirable resorts in Pilar de la Horadada, close to beaches, restaurants, shops, and sports facilities, this is a fantastic opportunity to own a nearly new apartment in a prime Costa Blanca location.

Find your perfect Mediterranean retreat with this exceptional 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom villa for sale in Vistabella. This detached property is fully equipped for modern living, powered by 15 high-efficiency solar panels and 3 storage batteries for eco-friendly peace of mind. The expansive outdoor grounds are a sun-drenched paradise, featuring a pristine, fully renovated private swimming pool, a secure closed garage with space for 2 cars, and an outdoor kitchen for unforgettable summer barbecues under the stars. Whether you are lounging by the poolside or entertaining guests, the incredible exterior space provides the perfect setting to embrace the relaxed Costa Blanca lifestyle.
Step inside to explore a bright and beautifully modernised open-plan living space that effortlessly combines a contemporary kitchen, dining area, and a cosy lounge equipped with air conditioning and a feature wood burner for year-round comfort. The sleek, dark-toned kitchen is a chef's delight, complete with an elegant central island and integrated appliances, making it the perfect social hub for entertaining. Conveniently located on this main floor are two generously sized bedrooms. Upstairs, you will find the third bedroom, a second fully equipped kitchen, and a second bathroom, offering unparalleled privacy for visitors. This level leads out onto a spacious terrace where you can enjoy your morning coffee against a stunning backdrop of mountain views.
The true hidden gem of this home lies below: a fully renovated basement featuring a rustic brick-and-stone wine cellar (bodega) with authentic arched bottle racks that promise to be the talking point of every dinner party.
Golf enthusiasts will delight in the close proximity to Vistabella Golf, while the stunning, sandy beaches of the coast are just a short drive away. Conveniently connected to regional international airports for stress-free travel, this remarkable home is a rare find on the market.

Located in the popular Amapolas IV urbanisation in La Zenia, this charming 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom ground floor apartment offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and outdoor living in one of the Costa Blanca’s most sought-after areas.
The property features a bright south-east facing front terrace, ideal for enjoying the morning and afternoon sunshine, relaxing outdoors, or dining al fresco all year round. To the rear, a second private terrace provides additional outdoor space along with the convenience of a second bathroom, perfect for guests or after a day at the communal pool.
Inside, the apartment offers a practical and spacious layout with plenty of natural light, making it ideal as a holiday home, rental investment, or permanent residence. Residents can also enjoy access to a beautiful communal swimming pool and well-maintained communal areas.
Ideally situated close to all amenities, including supermarkets, bars, restaurants, and the famous La Zenia Boulevard shopping centre, while the stunning beaches of La Zenia are just a short distance away.
A fantastic opportunity to own a well-located apartment in the heart of La Zenia.

Discover a rare opportunity to own a private Mediterranean estate where comfort, versatility, and outdoor living come together in perfect harmony. Set on an expansive 5,000 m² plot on the edge of charming Los Montesinos, this exceptional property offers the tranquility of the countryside while remaining just moments from everyday amenities, restaurants, and local life.
Designed to accommodate large families, guests, or investment potential, the estate features three fully independent residences, each with its own unique atmosphere and complete privacy.
The main residence occupies the upper floor and impresses with its contemporary style, bright open spaces, and seamless indoor-outdoor feel. Large windows flood the home with natural light, while the spacious open-plan kitchen and living area create the ideal setting for entertaining or relaxing with family. Three generous bedrooms and two modern bathrooms complete this elegant living space.
A second independent home offers comfortable and practical accommodation, perfect for extended family, visiting friends, or rental opportunities.
Completing the estate is a charming separate apartment featuring two bright bedrooms, its own kitchen, and peaceful open views across the surrounding landscape — an inviting retreat for guests or holiday tenants.
Outside, the property truly comes to life. Surrounded by mature gardens and fruit trees, the grounds have been designed for enjoying the Mediterranean climate all year round. A private swimming pool provides the perfect place to cool off during warm summer days, while the sports court and outdoor summer kitchen create an ideal environment for entertaining, family gatherings, and evenings under the stars. An automatic irrigation system ensures the gardens remain lush and vibrant with minimal effort.
Located in one of the most desirable areas of the southern Costa Blanca, the property benefits from excellent connections and an outstanding lifestyle. The golden beaches of Guardamar del Segura, Torrevieja, and Orihuela Costa are only a short drive away, while prestigious golf courses including Vistabella Golf and La Finca Golf are within easy reach. With quick access to the AP-7 motorway and Alicante–Elche Miguel Hernández Airport less than 40 minutes away, this estate offers both privacy and convenience in equal measure.
Whether you are searching for a spacious family residence, a multi-generational home, or a property with exceptional rental potential, this Mediterranean retreat offers endless possibilities in an enviable location.

Situated in the heart of the ever-popular Playa Flamenca, this beautifully fully renovated south-facing 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom ground floor apartment offers stylish, move-in-ready living in a fantastic coastal location.
Finished to a high standard throughout and sold fully furnished, the property combines modern comfort with Mediterranean charm, making it ideal as a permanent residence or holiday home.

Ideally located within walking distance to supermarkets, bars, restaurants, and all local amenities, this apartment offers exceptional convenience while being just a short distance from the beautiful beaches of Playa Flamenca and the popular Zenia Boulevard shopping centre.

This beautifully presented top-floor 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment is located in the highly desirable Dream Hills community, offering the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and modern Mediterranean living. Designed with energy efficiency in mind, the apartment benefits from 8 solar panels supplying electricity, as well as a private electric car charging point located in the downstairs storeroom. Set on an impressive 5,800 m² plot, this exceptional 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom finca near Catral offers privacy, space, and breathtaking mountain views, along with a fully self-contained guest apartment—making it ideal for extended family, visitors, or rental potential.

A self-contained apartment with its own lounge, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, and WC Air conditioning and ceiling fans installed throughout the home for year-round comfort Part-furnished sale for added convenience

Immaculate and very well presented bungalow style property for sale with sea views. Situated on a corner plot with a fantastic amount of private, outdoor space. Located in the ever-popular area of Villamartín, just moments from the vibrant La Fuente Commercial Center, this beautifully presented 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and coastal living.

An exceptional opportunity to take over the traspaso on a well-established and highly popular bar/restaurant in San Miguel, offering strong year-round trade and a loyal customer base. This impressive 341m² venue accommodates up to 170 guests and includes a vibrant terrace with seating for 70, creating the perfect setting for both busy summer evenings and consistently strong winter trade. Its reputation as a lively social hub is reinforced by its live music licence and permission to play music until 1:30am, making it a go-to destination for entertainment and nightlife in the area. In addition, the unique ability to close the street once per month for live events provides a fantastic opportunity to host larger-scale entertainment and boost revenue even further. Inside, the venue is fully equipped for immediate operation, featuring a fully fitted professional kitchen capable of supporting a full food offering. A particularly unique advantage is the inclusion of an on-site barber shop, creating an additional income stream and setting the business apart from typical bar/restaurant offerings. The venue has built a strong community presence, currently hosting two pool teams and two darts teams, which helps maintain regular footfall and a loyal customer base throughout the year. The business is being sold as seen, allowing for a smooth and immediate transition. There are 6 years remaining on the lease, with a very reasonable monthly rent, making it an attractive and sustainable opportunity. This is a turnkey opportunity with multiple revenue streams, a proven track record, and a reputation as one of the area’s most vibrant venues. Ideal for an experienced operator or anyone looking to step into a busy, profitable business with strong foundations and clear potential for further growth.

As you enter the property, you are welcomed by a bright and spacious living room, offering plenty of natural light and a comfortable area for relaxing or entertaining. From here you move through to a large separate kitchen and dining area, providing generous space for family meals and gatherings.

The home is arranged over three levels, offering plenty of space for family life. On the first floor there are two bedrooms and a family bathroom, while the top floor offers two additional bedrooms and another bathroom, making the layout ideal for larger families or hosting guests.
One bedroom on each level enjoys its own private terrace, while the other bedrooms benefit from peaceful views over open green fields and towards the surrounding mountains, giving the property a wonderful sense of space and tranquillity.
With its generous living space, private pool, quiet location, and close proximity to shops and the beach, this property represents a fantastic opportunity as a permanent home, holiday retreat, or rental investment.

We are proud to present this fantastic family home in the heart of Las Lomas del Rame. This extraordinary designer villa offers refined luxury just moments from the tranquil shores of the Mar Menor.
Designed and meticulously built by its current owner, the home was built with uncompromising attention to quality, comfort, and effortless maintenance. Every material has been thoughtfully selected; every detail carefully considered. The result is a residence that feels both sophisticated and serenely welcoming.
Beyond the secure gated entrance lies a stunning private courtyard — the true heart of the home. Here, a striking heated swimming pool doubles as a jacuzzi, creating a tranquil ambiance. A stylish seating area is framed by full-height glass walls that dissolve the boundary between indoors and outdoors, allowing natural light to flood the interior and creating a feeling of truly open plan living.
Inside, the spacious living and dining area enjoys uninterrupted views of the courtyard, blending contemporary elegance and warmth. The designer kitchen is a statement in both form and function, featuring sleek quartz worktops, a breakfast bar, and a central island with an induction hob — perfect for casual mornings or entertaining guests.
A hallway leads to the more private quarters: a refined home office, which could easily be converted to a fourth bedroom, a beautifully appointed guest bedroom, and the luxurious master suite. Both bedrooms boast en-suite bathrooms with rain showers, while the master suite also offers a generous dressing room.
Upstairs, a separate guest suite with its own en-suite bathroom opens onto an expansive terrace. With its independent entrance, it offers privacy and comfort — an ideal retreat for visitors.
The real magic of this property lies in the hidden details, those that the current owner has thought through and implemented impeccably.
The villa features heated flooring throughout, vented air conditioning and heating as well as a log burner fireplace. An air filtration system removes dust and provides fresh and clean air throughout the property continuously. The kitchen cupboards open and close electrically, with a touch. The villa has its own high pressure water pump ensuring that the showers give a strong current throughout. Hand carved wooden doors and electric blinds and shutters feature throughout the property as well as industrial LED lighting which illuminates the home at night.
Just a few of the features that transform this incredible villa into a truly comfortable and enjoyable home.
There is a secure garage with space for two cars as well as a covered concrete car port. A fully fitted utility room features washing machine, tumble dryer and storage.
The home is sold fully furnished.
The villa is located in the charming and peaceful village of Las Lomas del Rame, part of Los Alcázares. Surrounded by open countryside yet superbly connected, it offers easy access to vibrant local life, beaches, and amenities. The nearest beach is just five minutes away by car.
Golf enthusiasts will appreciate the proximity to renowned courses such as La Serena Golf (3 minutes), Roda Golf and Beach Resort (10 minutes), and Mar Menor Golf Resort (10 minutes). Travel is effortless, with Murcia International Airport just 30 minutes away and Alicante Airport approximately 55 minutes away.
Nearby shopping destinations include Centro Comercial Dos Mares (10 minutes), Centro Comercial Espacio Mediterráneo (20 minutes), and Centro Comercial La Zenia (25 minutes).
Property Highlights:
- 3 Bedrooms / Optional 4th
- 4 Bathrooms
- Private pool with integrated jacuzzi
- Expansive roof terrace
- Advanced home automation system
- Sold fully furnished / Key ready
Built: 286.04 m²
Plot: 796.5 m²
This is more than a home — it is a private sanctuary of light, design, and understated luxury in one of the Costa Cálida’s most desirable settings.

Once in a lifetime opportunity to purchase an incredible villa on a huge 11,000m2 plot with breath-taking views over Embalase de la Pedrera reservoir in Torremendo. This huge elevated plot is easily accessed from the main road with a private road leading up towards the main villa and fully landscaped garden with private swimming pool, double garage, the horse stables and vast paddock area. The villa has been built to very high specification with many special features and extras including solar panels, heated swimming pool with electric roof, double garage and separate storage room, oil central heating, air-conditioning, log burner, hidden utility room, plus a lot more. The villa has a very thoughtful layout that flows with high ceilings and floor to ceiling windows that make the absolute most of the spectacular views across the lake, lemon groves and reservoir. On the ground floor of the property there are three double bedrooms, a family bathroom with shower and bathtub, the fantastic L-shaped living and dining room which leads into the fully equipped bespoke kitchen. To the rear of the kitchen is a covered terrace and storage area which wraps around to the swimming pool. This area has direct views across Torremendo and the reservoir and no expense has been sparred with the installation of the heated pool and electric roof to make this space useable all year round. The impressive master bedroom is accessed from a private staircase in the living room where you will find the bespoke en-suite bathroom with walk in shower, bathroom and luxurious vanity unit. The master bedroom also has a walk in dressing room along with a private terrace overlooking the vast plot towards the Embalse de la Pedrera reservoir, Vega Baja mountain range and the pretty lemon groves. Outside, the garden has been beautifully landscaped with ornamental stones, Mediterranean trees and plants and is maintained to an immaculate standard. The main plot is accessed via electric gates where there is also the purpose built double garage along with a large storage room and boiler room. The property also boasts an equestrian area with four beautiful stables, the tack room, and paddock area which leads down to another plot with a small summer house. The potential to develop this space into a business is huge. This property is sold furnished and really must be seen to be truly appreciated.

FRONTLINE, STUNNING SEA VIEWS! We are proud to present a beautiful, renovated frontline apartment located in Mil Palmeras, renowned as one of the finest beaches on the coast. The livingroom area opens onto a large terrace, offering beautiful views of the sea. The property comes fully furnished and includes air conditioning and elevator access. The area offers a vibrant strip for dining, a lot of restaurants ,bars, beach bars, shops and more. Mil Palmeras is known for its beautiful beaches, clear waters and is considered one of the best in the Orihuela costa coastline.

This exclusive villa stands out for its 3 bright bedrooms, 3 en-suite bathrooms and spacious terraces with private swimming pool, creating a perfect space to relax and enjoy the warm Mediterranean climate.
